title: Panda Reply
description: Drop-in configurable Fabric mod to add /reply /r compatible with NoChatReports
body:
# PandaReply

## Description

A simple drop-in Fabric mod that adds /r and /reply that works with NoChatReports.
By default, it will reply to the last person you SENT a message to (so you don't accidentally send a private message to a person who messages you as you are typing your message)

## Configuring

config/PandaReply.json generated at runtime

```
{
  "replyToLastReceived": false,  //Whether to reply to who you last sent to (false) or who you last received from (true)
  "noSentMessage": "<red><bold>You haven't messaged anyone yet!",
  "noReceivedMessage": "<red><bold>No one has messaged you yet!"
}
```

## Try it out
`hardcoreanarchy.gay`   (Deathban Anarchy)  
`sky.hardcoreanarchy.gay`   (Skyblock Anarchy)

## Support

[Support discord here!]( https://discord.gg/3tP3Tqu983)
